commands.review_summary:
Threads `sourceReplyDeliveryMode` through Codex/OpenClaw tool construction and appends a `message_tool_only` visible-reply hint to the `message` tool description, with focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main carries the message-tool-only policy into prompts and force-message selection, while the actual dynamic `message` tool description remains generic; the PR body adds terminal proof for the after-fix factory output.
